frictions.description: Navigation nodes require a slug and nodeType. Validation threw 400s when trying to post raw payload from assertions. Needed to add 'slug' and 'nodeType'='group'.
frictions.resolution: Updated test payloads to include 'slug' and 'nodeType'.

frictions.description: Circular reference logic is robust: moving a node under another node only triggers circular reference if it's an ancestor. Tests needed to create a fresh child and parent properly.
frictions.resolution: Created a dedicated test script to accurately map a fresh node under another and reverse the reference to assert the 400.
